should_trigger: Do a deep research report on this market and cite the sources.
Turn these notes into an evidence-backed recommendation for leadership.
Plan this multi-step research project before you start.
Find the source of this claim and tell me whether it is actually supported.
Compare these options using internal files and current public evidence.
Audit my memo for unsupported claims and citation problems.
Build a source ledger and claim ledger for this report.
Research these independent questions in parallel and synthesize the results.
Review the feedback on this report before changing the draft.
Verify this brief before I send it to the executive team.
Package the final research deliverable with its evidence and known limits.
I have a rough knowledge-work request. Help me define what the finished result should be.
should_not_trigger: What time is it in London?
Fix the failing unit test in this repository.
Create a React landing page from this screenshot.
Draft a one-line reply saying I will attend.
Explain what this single paragraph means in plain English.
Generate an icon of a green leaf.
Format this existing list as bullets without changing the words.
